====Pokémon====
<!--Do NOT add female to Abomasnow, Sneasel, Medicham, and Dodrio's templates. Abomasnow, Sneasel, and Medicham's gender difference involve the length of a body part which can be difficult to discern due to the possibility of animation inconsistencies. In Dodrio's case, the male variant did not appear by the time Candice's Dodrio appeared nor has a male variant appeared since. Please refer to the speculation policy for more information.-->
=====On hand=====
{{MissingInfo|2|enva|java}}
This listing is of Candice's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Abomasnow
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ice
|img=Candice Abomasnow.png
|epnum=DP126
|epname=Classroom Training!
|vajp=Chie Satō
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc=Candice's main Pokémon and the major powerhouse of her team is {{p|Abomasnow}}. She first appeared battling [[Zoey's Glameow]] [[DP126|soon after]] Ash and {{ashfr}} entered [[Snowpoint City]]. She was later paired with {{AP|Buizel}} to help stop {{TRT}} from stealing the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}} supply of Pokémon.

In ''[[DP127|Sliding Into Seventh!]]'', Abomasnow was Candice's final Pokémon in her Gym battle against Ash. Abomasnow knocked out Staraptor and Grotle before Chimchar defeated her with {{m|Flame Wheel}}.

Abomasnow made another appearance in ''[[DP155|Double-Time Battle Training!]]'', where Candice used her to demonstrate move combinations for {{an|Dawn}}. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[DP183|League Unleashed!]]''.

Abomasnow briefly appeared alongside Candice during the ending credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''.

Abomasnow's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Wood Hammer}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, {{m|Ice Punch}}, and {{m|Razor Leaf}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Sneasel
|type1=Dark
|type2=Ice
|img=Candice Sneasel.png
|epnum=DP127
|epname=Sliding Into Seventh!
|vajp=Satsuki Yukino
|vaen=Kayzie Rogers
|desc={{p|Sneasel}} was the first Pokémon used by Candice during her Gym battle against {{Ash}} when she went up against {{AP|Grotle}}. Although Sneasel had an obvious [[type]] advantage and could skate across the icy battlefield, Grotle was able to use its new defensive battle technique to absorb Sneasel's attacks and knocked her out with {{m|Rock Climb}}.

Sneasel's known moves are {{m|Icy Wind}} and {{m|Fury Swipes}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Medicham
|type1=Fighting
|type2=Psychic
|img=Candice Medicham.png
|epnum=DP127
|epname=Sliding Into Seventh!
|vajp=
|vaen=Emily Jenness
|desc=Candice's second choice was {{p|Medicham}}. Medicham was sent up against {{AP|Staraptor}}. Despite a good battle, she was knocked out by Staraptor's {{m|Brave Bird}}.

Medicham's known moves are {{m|Confusion}} and {{m|Fire Punch}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Snover
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ice
|img=Candice Snover.png
|epnum=DP127
|epname=Sliding Into Seventh!
|vajp=Satsuki Yukino
|vaen=Carter Cathcart{{!}}Billy Beach
|desc={{p|Snover}} was Candice's third Pokémon to be used, and she proved to be a powerful {{pkmn|battle}}r, knowing plenty of {{t|Ice}} and {{t|Grass}} attacks that were used to defeat [[Ash's Gliscor]]. However, Snover was knocked out by [[Ash's Chimchar]].

Snover's known moves are {{m|Razor Leaf}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Bullet Seed}}, and {{m|Icy Wind}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Dodrio
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Candice Dodrio.png
|epnum=DP128
|epname=A Pyramiding Rage!
|desc=Candice has a {{p|Dodrio}} that she used as a mode of transportation in ''[[DP128|A Pyramiding Rage!]]''.

None of Dodrio's moves are known.}}

=====Temporary=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Turtwig
|type1=Grass
|img=Candice Turtwig.png
|epnum=DP126
|epname=Classroom Training!
|desc=Candice used a {{p|Turtwig}} when she was younger in the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}}, as seen in a flashback in ''[[DP126|Classroom Training!]]''. It is unknown if it is now in her ownership or if it still is used for youngsters in the Trainers' School.

=====Helped raise=====
{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Zoey
|pkmn=Glameow
|type1=Normal
|img=Candice Zoey Glameow.png
|epnum=DP011
|epname=Mounting a Coordinator Assault!
|vajp=Ikue Ohtani
|vaen=Ikue Ohtani
|desc=Candice stated that she helped raise [[Zoey]]'s {{p|Glameow}} when she was younger. Zoey kept it in a shed outside the {{ci|Snowpoint}} {{pkmn|Trainers' School}} when her parents would not let her have it. One day, [[Mr. Honcho]], the headmaster of the school, found out what Zoey was doing. Candice stepped in, and Mr. Honcho eventually gave in. Candice and Glameow have been friends ever since.}}
